CVE-2018-19519.title: In tcpdump 4.9.2, a stack-based buffer over-read exists in the pr ...
CVE-2018-19519.description: In tcpdump 4.9.2, a stack-based buffer over-read exists in the print_prefix function of print-hncp.c via crafted packet data because of missing initialization.

CVE-2019-1010220.title: tcpdump.org tcpdump 4.9.2 is affected by: CWE-126: Buffer Over-re ...
CVE-2019-1010220.description: tcpdump.org tcpdump 4.9.2 is affected by: CWE-126: Buffer Over-read. The impact is: May expose Saved Frame Pointer, Return Address etc. on stack. The component is: line 234: "ND_PRINT((ndo, "%s", buf));", in function named "print_prefix", in "print-hncp.c". The attack vector is: The victim must open a specially crafted pcap file.

CVE-2023-1801.title: The SMB protocol decoder in tcpdump version 4.99.3 can perform an ...
CVE-2023-1801.description: The SMB protocol decoder in tcpdump version 4.99.3 can perform an out-of-bounds write when decoding a crafted network packet.
